description: Starting with an empty gvSIG project, apply a 'Unique Values' symbology classification to the countries layer (/home/ga/gvsig_data/countries/ne_110m_admin_0_countries.shp) using the CONTINENT field. Ensure all continents are categorized with distinct colors. Save the project to /home/ga/gvsig_data/projects/continent_categories.gvsproj and export the map view to /home/ga/gvsig_data/exports/continent_map.png.
